title: Glasgow Prestwick Airport Named Air Freight Business of the Year

sections.heading: Recognition for Trade Links and Cargo Growth
sections.content: Glasgow Prestwick Airport has been recognised as the Air Freight Business of the Year. The award highlights the airport's success in strengthening trade links and achieving sustainable growth in cargo operations.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Glasgow Prestwick Airport Named Air Freight Business of the Year
